target_skill.name: delegate-mechanical
target_skill.description: Haiku sub-agent for rote bulk work — summarize, extract, scaffold, compress, filter by tag/keyword, scan. Use proactively. Not for judgment (→ delegate-analytical) or async (→ fire-routine).

competing_skills.name: delegate-analytical
competing_skills.description: Sonnet sub-agent for solo judgment — review, compare, rank, evaluate. Use proactively. Not for flaw-finding (→ delegate-adversarial), rote (→ delegate-mechanical), or panel (→ review-panel).

competing_skills.name: delegate-adversarial
competing_skills.description: Opus sub-agent for solo flaw-finding — adversarial review, security audit, "tear this apart", architecture critique. Not for standard review (→ delegate-analytical) or panel (→ review-panel).

competing_skills.name: fire-routine
competing_skills.description: Fire async Claude Code Routines — "fire scout-r", "fire skill-worker-r", "drain the queue", "routine-fire X". Not for inline scoring/scouting (→ idea-scout) or sync delegation (→ delegate-*).

competing_skills.name: build
competing_skills.description: Write working code — "build this", "prototype this", "MVP this", "make it real". Not for planning (→ architect), bugs (→ systematic-debug), or deploy (→ ship-it).

positive_cases: Extract every URL from this API response into a flat list
Summarize this 4-page transcript into one paragraph
Scan these files and pull out every TODO comment
Filter this idea dump down to just the ones tagged 'tools'
negative_cases: Compare these three architecture options and rank them (expect delegate-analytical)
Tear this skill design apart — every flaw, every failure mode (expect delegate-adversarial)
Fire scout-r on the new idea queue overnight (expect fire-routine)
Build me a React component to render this list (expect build)
Evaluate which of these three naming options reads best (expect delegate-analytical)
